_description: Synthetic OTel GenAI spans for looptrip pathology-detector reference tests. These spans use the real upstream attribute keys from semantic-conventions-genai PR #98 so the fixture doubles as standards evidence.

_attribute_provenance.gen_ai.agent.handoff.source.name: semantic-conventions-genai PR #98 (adopted verbatim) — the agent performing the handoff
_attribute_provenance.gen_ai.agent.handoff.target.name: semantic-conventions-genai PR #98 (adopted verbatim) — the agent receiving the handoff
_attribute_provenance.gen_ai.agent.handoff.state: looptrip-PROPOSED enum (pending upstream) — PR #98 models a COMPLETED transfer only. PENDING values ('blocked', 'waiting') signal a wait-for edge; they match looptrip's blocked_states vocabulary and feed the deadlock detector. ACTIVE values ('in_progress') represent a live transfer in motion; the mapper sets to_agent from gen_ai.agent.handoff.target.name (enabling ping-pong handoff-edge detection) but these values do NOT match blocked_states, so the deadlock detector ignores them. The PENDING vs ACTIVE distinction is load-bearing for the deadlock-vs-ping-pong separation.
_attribute_provenance.gen_ai.operation.name: semantic-conventions-genai, value 'execute_tool'

deadlock._label: (a) DEADLOCK — code-writer blocked awaiting code-reviewer, code-reviewer blocked awaiting code-writer; directed wait-for cycle

ping_pong._label: (b) PING-PONG — planner and code-writer actively bounce completed work to each other (planner→code-writer→planner→…) with no net progress; directed cycle closes twice
ping_pong._expected: detect_ping_pong(use_handoff_edges=True) fires; detect_deadlock() returns [] (livelock is NOT a deadlock — agents are active, not blocked-waiting)
ping_pong._note: state='in_progress' is an ACTIVE transfer: the mapper sets to_agent from gen_ai.agent.handoff.target.name (enabling handoff-edge detection), but the bare token 'in_progress' does not match blocked_states so detect_deadlock ignores these events entirely.

control._label: (c) CONTROL — clean linear handoff chain: agent-alpha → agent-beta → agent-gamma; no cycle; must NOT trip either detector
control._note: No gen_ai.agent.handoff.state attribute on any span — these are completed (non-blocking) transfers. The mapping produces handoff_state=None, so the deadlock blocked-map is empty and ping-pong handoff-edge mode inserts no synthetic hops.
